name: FIREWALL: Cyber Defense
short_description: A lore-based cyberspace tower-defense where you defend artificially intelligent Constructs from Corrupted bugs and viruses.
detailed_description:
Overview

In the not-so-far future, you are hired by a mysterious Benefactor to take part in a simulation to protect self-aware Constructs from a mysterious Corrupted army seeking to use the Constructs for their own schemes. Battle enemies in lore-based cyberspace tower (or WALL) defense and find out more about the world your in... and the world outside.

Defend

Defend your FIREWALL from a steadily strengthening army of Corrupted, each with their own stats and some with special abilities.

Upgrade

Upgrade in many ways, some requiring XP, others requiring money to upgrade yourself to your fullest potential, whether upgrading through the SKILL Tree, empowering your turrets, or adding effects to your ICE.

Lore

Find or buy pieces of lore earnable in a variety of ways to know more about the simulated world and its Benefactor and take part in a story arc opening the question of who the Corrupted are.

AVATAR

Choose between five characters with different attacks and their own stats, dependent on who they are and upgrade them to have powerful abilities, not to mention change your characters looks a little.

Items

Find or buy items that can upgrade your ICE, empower you temporarily, or even change the music that plays while you battle!

Story

Talk to characters and cause an impact that can affect your experience with them later.
